mapper.insert: /* com.shop.mapper.product.ProductMng.insertCategoryProduct */ INSERT INTO TB_CATEGORY_PRODUCT ( SEQ , PARTNER_ID, CATEGORY_ID , PRODUCT_ID, CRE_USER, UPD_USER ) VALUES ( get_next_category_product_seq(#{categoryId}) , #{partnerId} , #{categoryId} , #{productId} , #{creUser} , #{updUser} )
